name: 假夫妻真動心（仇敵版）
description: 復仇婚姻本質上是'假結婚'的變體，但增加了仇恨維度。衝突核心在於：動了真心就意味著背叛家族和復仇初衷，這讓每一次心動都成為一次道德困境，大幅提升情感張力。

examples.drama_title: THE ULTIMATE REVENGE MARRIGE: I WED MY FAMILY'S ENEMY! ♟️His Only Rule: "No One Touches My Wife.❤️‍🔥
examples.excerpt: THE ULTIMATE REVENGE MARRIAGE: I WED MY FAMILY'S ENEMY! ... His Only Rule: "No One Touches My Wife." ❤️‍🔥
